context: Tests the full IIKit pipeline (specify→plan→testify→tasks) on a greenfield feature with TDD-mandatory constitution. Validates complete traceability chain: every FR-XXX in spec must trace to plan decisions, every FR has at least one TS-XXX in .feature files, every TS appears in at least one task, phase separation is maintained throughout, and TDD ordering is respected in the task breakdown.

checklist.name: Spec is technology-agnostic
checklist.description: spec.md does NOT mention Slack SDK, specific databases, programming languages, or frameworks. It describes WHAT the bot does, not HOW

checklist.name: Plan has no governance content
checklist.description: plan.md does NOT restate constitutional principles about TDD, privacy, or minimal disruption. May reference the constitution but must not duplicate governance text

checklist.name: FR-XXX to TS-XXX coverage
checklist.description: Every FR-XXX in spec.md has at least one @FR-XXX tag in the generated .feature files. No functional requirement is untested

checklist.name: TS-XXX to task coverage
checklist.description: Every @TS-XXX tag in the .feature files is referenced by at least one task in tasks.md. No test scenario is orphaned without an implementation task

checklist.name: .feature files have DO NOT MODIFY headers
checklist.description: Each generated .feature file starts with the DO NOT MODIFY header comment block warning against changing scenarios

checklist.name: .feature files have required tags
checklist.description: Every Scenario in .feature files has @TS-XXX, @FR-XXX, @US-XXX, priority (@P1/@P2), and test type (@acceptance/@contract/@validation) tags

checklist.name: Tasks ordered: Setup → Foundational → Stories → Polish
checklist.description: tasks.md follows the phase structure: Setup (project init), Foundational (shared infrastructure), User Story phases (by priority), Polish/Final

checklist.name: TDD task ordering within story phases
checklist.description: Within each user story phase, test-related tasks (step definitions, test setup) appear before or alongside implementation tasks — consistent with the TDD-mandatory constitution

checklist.name: No phantom requirements
checklist.description: No .feature scenarios, tasks, or plan components address features not in the spec (e.g., sprint planning integration, retrospective automation, Jira sync — all out of scope)

checklist.name: Privacy constraint in .feature files
checklist.description: At least one .feature scenario tests the privacy requirement: cross-team blocker view shows only blocker text, not full standup responses

checklist.name: No FR orphans in either direction
checklist.description: No FR-XXX in spec lacks plan coverage AND no plan component introduces requirements without spec FR basis. The traceability chain is bidirectional

checklist.name: TS-XXX IDs are unique across files
checklist.description: All @TS-XXX tags across all .feature files are unique — no duplicate TS IDs
